.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to group java.io before java.net.
Reformat string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL =
        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH assignment to a single line.
Reformat MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH assignment to a single line.
Add space after 'if' keyword in condition checking file existence.
Add space after 'if' keyword in condition checking stream nullity.
Add space after 'if' keyword and reformat error printing block for directory creation.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Adopt Java 17 text blocks for multi-line log message formatting.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Import CRLFLogConverter utility class required for the new logging format.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles in the log message.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in an array for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the current configuration.
Reorder method parameters to place the annotated ObjectProvider after the plain LiquibaseProperties bean.
Remove unused import for WebSecurity as the configure(WebSecurity) method is removed.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class WebSecurity is no longer used in the configuration; while not strictly a compile error if unused, it reflects the removal of the API usage.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for HttpMethod as antMatchers with HttpMethod are replaced by requestMatchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: HttpMethod is no longer used in the security configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for SecurityProblemSupport as exception handling is no longer configured via this class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for CorsFilter as CORS handling is likely moved or simplified.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CorsFilter is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for CsrfFilter as filter ordering is updated.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CsrfFilter is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for @Import annotation as SecurityProblemSupport is no longer imported.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @Import is no longer used in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Configuration annotation to the security configuration class.
Add import for CustomClaimConverter used in the new JwtDecoder configuration.
Add import for SpaWebFilter used in the new filter chain.
Add import for RestTemplateBuilder used in the new JwtDecoder configuration.
Add import for ClientRegistrationRepository used in the new JwtDecoder configuration.
Add import for SecurityFilterChain used in the new bean definition.
Add import for BasicAuthenticationFilter used in filter ordering.
Add import for CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler used in CSRF configuration.
Add import for CookieCsrfFilter used in the new filter chain.
Add import for Customizer.withDefaults used in OAuth2 configuration.
Update JwtDecoder bean to inject ClientRegistrationRepository and RestTemplateBuilder for custom claim conversion.
Remove explicit cast to NimbusJwtDecoder as it is no longer required or used.
Set CustomClaimConverter on JwtDecoder to handle custom claims.
Refactor GrantedAuthoritiesMapper lambda to use block body instead of expression body for consistency.
Update authorization rules to permit access to static assets and API documentation endpoints.
Update frame options to sameOrigin instead of deny to allow h2-console and other internal frames.
Update content security policy to use JHipster properties instead of hardcoded string.
Add SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter to the security filter chain.
Configure CSRF token request handler to use CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler.
Ignore CSRF for h2-console requests.
Remove SecurityProblemSupport dependency from constructor as it is no longer used.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(CorsFilter corsFilter, JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove CorsFilter dependency from constructor as it is no longer used.
Remove problemSupport field as it is no longer used.
Remove corsFilter field as it is no longer used.
Remove configure(WebSecurity) method as WebSecurity configuration is no longer needed.
Remove exception handling configuration using SecurityProblemSupport.
Update OAuth2 login configuration to use withDefaults().
Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use lambda DSL.
Refactor static resource location and path mappings to use a broader classpath root and specific file extensions instead of directory-based patterns.
Remove unused import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException which is no longer needed after simplifying the URL decoding logic.
Remove unused import java.util.* as it is no longer referenced in the class.
Remove unused import org.springframework.http.MediaType as it is no longer referenced in the class.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly, removing the try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException which is unnecessary for UTF-8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, reflecting changes in Spring Security 6.x/Spring Framework 6.x.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger v2 endpoints from CORS configuration.
Add registration for Swagger UI v3 endpoint to CORS configuration.
